[uBlock Origin 1.0]
! Title: US Politics — Tier 3
! Description: Filters US political and current-events noise
! Expires: 4 days
! Generated by scripts/generate.py — DO NOT EDIT.
! Edit words/us.yml, then: uv run python scripts/generate.py

! --- Reddit: Labels & Ideology ---
! Partisan and ideological labels
reddit.com##article:has-text(/\b(?:Political)\b/i)

! --- Reddit: Institutions — Government & Law ---
! Branches of government and legal entities
reddit.com##article:has-text(/\b(?:Government|United\ States|America|president|U\.S(?:\.A)?)\b/i)

! --- Reddit: Tech & Billionaires ---
! Figures and companies dominating political/social discourse
reddit.com##article:has-text(/\b(?:Elmo)\b/i)

! --- Reddit: AI News ---
! AI hype and product/news noise
reddit.com##article:has-text(/\b(?:Claude)\b/i)

! --- Reddit: Geopolitics & Conflict ---
! International relations and war-related terms
reddit.com##article:has-text(/\b(?:France)\b/i)

! --- Reddit: Social Issues & Controversy ---
! High-controversy social topics
reddit.com##article:has-text(/\b(?:LGBT|Jeffrey|Karen|Idiocracy|Measles|Transgender)\b/i)

! --- Reddit: Economy & Cost of Living ---
! Economic-anxiety and cost-of-living noise
reddit.com##article:has-text(/\b(?:Economic|Grocery|Groceries)\b/i)

! --- Reddit: Overzealous Words ---
! Words that _could_ trigger political speech
reddit.com##article:has-text(/\b(?:shadow\ docket|project 202[56]|impeach(?:ment)?|nationalism|rigged)\b/i)

! --- Reddit: site-specific ---
! Reddit meme/noise terms.
reddit.com##article:has-text(/\b(?:me_irl|meirl|doge)\b/i)
